name: 05-11-05-11-social-memory-debug-panel
title: Add Social Memory Debug Panel for NPC Chat UX
description: Build a frontend debug panel to visualize which social memories are retrieved and injected into NPC chat prompts. Show keyword match score, recency bonus, and top-k results to help owners understand NPC social awareness.
scope: owner-only frontend social memory debug panel in tavern chat workbench
creator: lijin
notes: Added owner-only Social KB debug panel component (SocialMemoryCreationPanel) to the tavern chat sidecar, using existing character.social_memories to estimate source-name, n-gram, recency, fallback, and top-k retrieval. Also wired createdMemories tracking from sendTavernChat API results into the panel, so owners can see memories auto-created during the chat session. Added frontend regression script and package test wiring. Validation passed: focused frontend script, backend social memory retrieval tests, full frontend test, and frontend build.
